acceptance_condition: Accepted synthetic research replication rubric-artifact fixture proves paper capsule, rubric tree, artifact manifest, experiment DAG, metric scripts, grader trace, cost budget, failure taxonomy, and cold replay while rejecting hidden rubric leakage, forbidden original-code reuse, private data, report-only success, unbounded compute, and benchmark score claims.
title: Research replication rubric-artifact replay compound
why_after: PaperBench and CORE-Bench make research replication a visible, difficult agent-evaluation frontier; local credibility requires rubric, artifact, experiment, grader, and cost evidence rather than a report or score.
ML experiment lineage, deep-research citation audit, mission transactions, and proof/evidence receipts already own the pieces; this row fuses them into a paper-to-artifact replay fixture.
why_before: feeds proof/evidence, mission work, deep research, formal math, and public reveal fixtures with paper-to-artifact replication receipts
feeds benchmark-integrity replay with rubric leakage, original-code reuse, and grader-trace negative cases
